name: Builder Kit
description: A Flow Kit for shaping work, breaking it down, building changes, verifying evidence, preparing pull requests, checking merge readiness, and recording learning.

flows.description: Shape a problem into slices and fileable work items.
Pull ready work through design probing, planning, implementation, verification, pull request readiness, merge readiness, and learning.
Reusable delivery closeout extension for publish, provider/CI merge readiness, and learning feedback gates.

dependencies.reason: learning-review invokes knowledge-capture (kits/knowledge/skills/knowledge-capture/SKILL.md) for durable knowledge storage

must_include_actions: route decision_gap back to design-probe/pickup Probe
review-work for report-only critique before verify-work
not count critique.json as verification evidence

hook_influence_expectations.description: fresh coding prompt routes into Builder workflow
must_include_actions: use the `builder` kit's `builder.build` workflow before source edits
use deliver by default for coding/build work
do not bypass plan-work -> execute-plan -> review-work -> verify-work
publish, release readiness, and learning feedback

skills.description: Invoke Builder Kit shape from a raw idea or the current conversation context.
Advance a multi-slice work item to its next increment via a fresh-context handoff, routing the next slice through pull-work + pickup-probe.
Delivery workflow — selected work to delivered code.
Evaluate whether completed work is trustworthy enough for human review, merge, or release.
Enumerate gate fires and suspected misses from the session trust.bundle; classify as correct/false_block/missed_block; route findings to learning-review; propose advisory fixes.
Parallel execution primitive — plan artifact path to implemented code.
Bug fix orchestrator — diagnose, plan, execute, review, verify, loop.
Turn raw ideas into shaped, prioritized, executable GitHub issue backlog.
Capture post-merge learnings and feed them back into backlog, skills, tests, or knowledge.
Builder Kit work-item/docs/provider-grounded Probe specialization before plan-work.
Code planning primitive — goal + directory to structured execution plan.
Select ready GitHub issues from the executable backlog for implementation.
Decide whether evidence-backed work is ready to merge, release, deploy, or hold.
Review primitive — code, security, dependency, architecture critique before verification.
Test-driven development — RED, GREEN, REFACTOR with git checkpoints.
Verification primitive — session file path to structured evidence verdict.
